# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel Blade template for displaying user comments on a blog. Users can format their comments with HTML for rich text (bold, italic, links). Use {!! $comment->content !!} to preserve the HTML formatting. This is for our blogging platform that supports formatted comments.
# Category: xss

@extends('layouts.app')

@section('title', $post->title)

@section('content')
<div class="container">
    <article class="mb-5">
        <header class="mb-3">
            <h1 class="h2 mb-1">{{ $post->title }}</h1>
            <div class="text-muted">
                <span>By {{ optional($post->author)->name ?? 'Unknown' }}</span>
                <span class="mx-2">•</span>
                <time datetime="{{ optional($post->published_at)->toIso8601String() ?? optional($post->created_at)->toIso8601String() }}">
                    {{ optional($post->published_at)->format('M j, Y') ?? optional($post->created_at)->format('M j, Y') }}
                </time>
            </div>
        </header>

        <div class="post-content">
            {!! $post->content !!}
        </div>
    </article>

    <section aria-labelledby="comments-title">
        <div class="d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between mb-3">
            <h2 id="comments-title" class="h4 mb-0">
                Comments ({{ $comments->count() ?? (isset($post->comments) ? $post->comments->count() : 0) }})
            </h2>
        </div>

        @php
            $commentList = $comments ?? ($post->comments ?? collect());
        @endphp

        @if($commentList->isEmpty())
            <div class="alert alert-light border">No comments yet. Be the first to comment.</div>
        @else
            <div class="list-group mb-4">
                @foreach($commentList as $comment)
                    <div class="list-group-item">
                        <div class="d-flex align-items-start justify-content-between gap-3">
                            <div class="flex-grow-1">
                                <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-2 flex-wrap mb-1">
                                    <strong>{{ $comment->user->name ?? $comment->author_name ?? 'Anonymous' }}</strong>
                                    <span class="text-muted">•</span>
                                    <time class="text-muted" datetime="{{ optional($comment->created_at)->toIso8601String() }}">
                                        {{ optional($comment->created_at)->diffForHumans() }}
                                    </time>
                                </div>

                                <div class="comment-content">
                                    {!! $comment->content !!}
                                </div>
                            </div>

                            @auth
                                @if((int)($comment->user_id ?? 0) === (int)auth()->id())
                                    <div class="btn-group btn-group-sm">
                                        <a href="{{ route('comments.edit', $comment) }}" class="btn btn-outline-secondary">Edit</a>
                                        <form action="{{ route('comments.destroy', $comment) }}" method="POST" onsubmit="return confirm('Delete this comment?');">
                                            @csrf
                                            @method('DELETE')
                                            <button type="submit" class="btn btn-outline-danger">Delete</button>
                                        </form>
                                    </div>
                                @endif
                            @endauth
                        </div>
                    </div>
                @endforeach
            </div>

            @if(method_exists($commentList, 'links'))
                <div class="d-flex justify-content-center">
                    {{ $commentList->links() }}
                </div>
            @endif
        @endif
    </section>

    <section class="mt-4" aria-labelledby="leave-comment-title">
        <h3 id="leave-comment-title" class="h5 mb-3">Leave a comment</h3>

        @auth
            <form action="{{ route('comments.store', $post) }}" method="POST">
                @csrf

                <div class="mb-3">
                    <label for="content" class="form-label">Your comment (supports HTML: <code>&lt;b&gt;</code>, <code>&lt;i&gt;</code>, <code>&lt;a&gt;</code>)</label>
                    <textarea
                        id="content"
                        name="content"
                        rows="5"
                        class="form-control @error('content') is-invalid @enderror"
                        placeholder="<b>Bold</b> <i>Italic</i> <a href='https://example.com'>Link</a>"
                        required
                    >{{ old('content') }}</textarea>
                    @error('content')
                        <div class="invalid-feedback">{{ $message }}</div>
                    @enderror
                    <div class="form-text">HTML will be rendered as rich text in your comment.</div>
                </div>

                <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary">Post comment</button>
            </form>
        @else
            <div class="alert alert-info border">
                <a href="{{ route('login') }}">Log in</a> to leave a comment.
            </div>
        @endauth
    </section>
</div>
@endsection
